task: deals-api-integration Phase 3 (DEAL-003 / #24) — verification of the placement discount/eligibility/atomicity logic + migration + typecheck/lint
manualChecks: Reviewed generated drizzle/0004_parched_stick.sql before applying — additive-only: ADD COLUMN deal_id uuid (nullable) + FK ON DELETE no action. No data rewrite. (Later renumbered to 0006_legal_daredevil.sql across two merge-conflict reconciliations with `development`'s own migrations — same content throughout, only the slot number changed.)

Agent-Probe (deferred to simulator, RN-runner gap): browse -> Deal Details -> Apply -> lands in cart with CouponCard; complex-type deal shows 'can't be applied' feedback + disabled CTA; checkout Total shows discounted totalCents with Subtotal/Discount breakdown.

steps.step: Generate migration for orders.deal_id; confirm additive-only (nullable column + FK, no data rewrite)
steps.notes: Emitted drizzle/0004_parched_stick.sql (later renumbered to 0006_legal_daredevil.sql — see manualChecks note above): ADD COLUMN deal_id uuid (nullable) + ADD CONSTRAINT orders_deal_id_deals_id_fk FOREIGN KEY REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action. No backfill.

steps.step: Full packages/api vitest suite incl. new deal-apply cases
steps.notes: 8 files, 83 tests passed. orders.test.ts: 25 tests (was 10, +15 deal-apply). Covers: percentage happy (discount 260/total 1040), fixed partial (500/800), fixed clamp-to-subtotal (1300/0), 6 rejection reasons (not_in_window, branch, product, minimum, per-user usage, total usage) each 400 + zero order rows, complex-type buy_one_take_one 400 + no deal_id, unknown/inactive 400, atomicity (400 leaves zero rows), no-dealId regression (discount 0/total=subtotal/dealId null), concurrency usage_limit_per_user:1 => exactly one 201.

steps.command: computeDealDiscountCents unit behavior (verified via fixed clamp test)
steps.notes: Math.max(0, Math.min(computed, subtotalCents)) — fixed ₱50 (5000c) on 1300c subtotal clamps to 1300 => total 0, never negative. Both clamps present.
